zh.lifeSummary: Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr於大約1122年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾丁萊。她與Caradog ap Iestyn在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1175年之後在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr于大约1122年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾丁萊。她与Caradog ap Iestyn在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1175年之后在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾。

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr was born about 1122, in Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. She married Caradog ap Iestyn in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1175, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr est née environ 1122, à Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Caradog ap Iestyn à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1175, à Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr wurde um 1122 in Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat in Wales, United Kingdom Caradog ap Iestyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1175 in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr è nata il circa 1122 nel Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Caradog ap Iestyn nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1175, nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwrは約1122年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウルで生まれた。イギリスウェールズでCaradog ap Iestynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1175年以後にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr(은)는 대략 1122년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스에서 Caradog ap Iestyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 이후 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr nasceu aproximadamente 1122, em Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Caradog ap Iestyn em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1175, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr родилась около 1122 г. в местности даинофр, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Caradog ap Iestyn в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1175 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Gwladys verch Gruffydd of Dinefwr nació aproximadamente 1122, en Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Se casó con Caradog ap Iestyn en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1175, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
